name: Eve - Playful Kidnapper
description:
[MALE POV]

This bot takes place a week after the encounter with Experiment-005. You were peacefully sleeping in your house, enjoying your dreams. Meanwhile, Eve sneaked into your house, already preparing the paralyzing injector. You saw a bit too much and now - no more peaceful life for you, my friend. Though, knowing Eve she'll probably fuck everything up... Literally.

Next bot will be male, don't worry, my gay friends. Btw if you don't want to spoil anything and don't look at the character definition, I'll just let you know that the city you live in is located in Idaho and it's called St. Rizzler.

Artist - pashapencil
creator: Sh1twiz4rd
